questions: What is the disease severity (mild, moderate, severe)?
What is the extent of disease involvement (distal/left colonic, extensive)?
Does the patient require rectal medication? (Yes/No)
If rectal medication is required, what is the choice (Prednisolone phosphate enema, Hydrocortisone enema, Hydrocortisone foam)?
Is the disease limited to the rectum? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have systemic symptoms? (Yes/No)
Is the patient receiving IV medication? (Yes/No)
If IV medication is required, what is the drug choice (Hydrocortisone IV, Dexamethasone IV)?
Is the patient improving after 5 days? (Yes/No)
Does the patient fail to respond to steroids? (Yes/No)
Does the patient require maintenance therapy? (Yes/No)
Is the disease duration more than 10 years? (Yes/No)
